summary: Excellent sound‑board capture of a solid show – warm Phil bass and a nicely horn‑enhanced China Doll shine, with only occasional vocal slips from Jerry.
review: The recording is a clean sound‑board mix that puts the listener right in the venue, highlighting Phil’s warm low end and a surprisingly rich horn patch on “China Doll.” The band is described as being at the top of their game, though Jerry’s vocals are noted as a bit rough in places. Overall the performance and audio quality earn strong praise.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review praises both the show (top‑of‑their‑game playing) and the soundboard quality; other comments are neutral or brief, leading to a solid but not flawless rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, balanced mix with warm bass; reviewers note the board puts you right there and report no major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; reviewers focus on overall performance quality.

band_member_comments.Jerry: A little rough on lyrics and occasional vocal flub; also a MIDI‑based horn patch on his guitar.
band_member_comments.Phil: Warm bottom hum praised, indicating solid bass work.
band_member_comments.Drums: The “Tiger” drum sound is highlighted as sounding great.
